evals.prompt: I need session resumption for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the session-resumption-checker skill for this session resumption checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects session-resumption-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_session_resumption.
Keeps the response focused on checking TLS session resumption support (Session ID and Session Tickets per RFC 5077).

evals.prompt: Test whether example.com supports TLS session resumption and identify the mechanism.
evals.expected_output: Use the session-resumption-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects session-resumption-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
